title: Replace access-control.mo with updated owner-bypass logic and redeploy

quotes: Yes, use exactly this code for access-control.mo and redeploy

acceptanceCriteria: backend/access-control.mo contains exactly the code provided by the user with no modifications.
getUserRole returns #admin for OWNER_PRINCIPAL without querying userRoles map.
hasPermission returns true for OWNER_PRINCIPAL regardless of requiredRole.
The backend compiles and deploys without errors.
Logging in as the owner principal grants admin access without requiring registration or a token.

constraints: Do not modify the provided access-control.mo code in any way — use it exactly as given.
Do not change backend/main.mo logic unless strictly required to remain compatible with the updated access-control module interface.
Do not alter any frontend files.
nonGoals: Fixing the license lookup failure for account identifier VLARO-01.
Adding new backend features or endpoints.
